get.summary: Lists the available objects and their metadata for your organization’s data.
Lists the available fields/child-relationships and their metadata for the specified object.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: An optional comma-delimited list of field names/uniqueids

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: The depth to which foreign key definitions should be pursued.

parameters.name: enableRelatedListFiltering
parameters.description: When true, marks RelatedList fields as filterable in the response.

get.summary: Gets a list of Accounts corresponding to the given parameters.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search text

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma separated list of fields to retrieve

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Optional where clause (eg, Field1 = Val1 and Field2 > Val2)

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Comma separated list of fields to sort by

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: take
parameters.description: Number of results to take for pagination.

put.summary: Adds a single or many Accounts based on the specified view model(s).

parameters.name: viewModelObj
parameters.description: The view model(s).

post.summary: Gets a list of Accounts corresponding to the given data fields.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The search criteria for the request.

delete.summary: Deletes many Accounts by id.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Target ids

200.description: Returns the dictionary representation of the entity, but with only the Id key/value that was deleted

patch.summary: Updates many Accounts based on the specified view models.
patch.description: The success flag will be false if any items failed to update.

parameters.name: manyViewModels
parameters.description: Target view models.

parameters.name: returnFields
parameters.description: The return fields.

200.description: The items that were successfully updated with the items that failed to update.

get.summary: Exports the Accounts based on the same get parameters.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: target fields to return in the results

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Specific restrictions by field

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Comma separated list for sorting and whether or not to sort by desc or asc

parameters.name: fileType
parameters.description: The expected file type of the export file

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: The headers.

200.description: The response context that writes the response stream for the export

post.summary: Exports the Accounts based on the given data fields.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The export criteria for the request.

200.description: The response context that writes the response stream for the export
